subcodes.first_line: O ye loved ones of God! The news was received that a Mashriqu’l-Adhkar hath been established
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی خبر تاسیس مشرق الاذکار رسید که در آن دیار محامد و نعوت الهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wisdom [hikmat], @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @power of prayer
